channel.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Sep 13th - Sep 19th, 2021
item.description:
Modules

Data Structure

  • quetiestars110 - Just the cutest and tiniest queue/deque implementation!

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Mar 29th - Apr 4th, 2021
item.description:
Modules

String

  • pluralizestars1 - A very tiny library to pluralize words

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Mar 8th - Mar 14th, 2021
item.description:
Modules

String

  • slice.jsstars33 - Javascript library to enhance String.substring / Array.slice with python slice style.

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Oct 5th - Oct 11th, 2020
item.description:
Modules

File System

  • read-git-userstars3 - Reads the username and email from .gitconfig 🔧 and returns it as json object.

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Sep 28th - Oct 4th, 2020
item.description:
Modules

Math

  • fun-gcdstars0 - A tiny math library to get gcd of two numbers using Euclidean algorithm
  • my-primestars2 - A good way to tell if a number is prime or not.

    • Modules

    Other

  • mime-type-checkstars5 - Get the MIME type of a file by its extension.

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Aug 17th - Aug 23rd, 2020
item.description:
Modules

Math

  • is-evenstars167 - A good way to tell if a number is even or not (avoids type issues). Uses is-odd and is-number under the hood.
  • is-oddstars227 - A good way to tell if a number is odd or not (avoids type issues). Uses is-number under the hood.
  • easy-math.jsstars7 - A tiny easy math library including addition, multiplication, subtraction, and division.

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Jul 20th - Jul 26th, 2020
item.description:
Modules

Other

  • shurleystars5 - Parses URLs from user input (with potential typos in protocols, bad copy+paste, etc.) and returns a proper URL.

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Sep 24th - Sep 30th, 2018
item.description:
Modules

Function

  • compose-tinystars45 - A very tiny and fast compose function.

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Apr 23rd - Apr 29th, 2018
item.description:
Modules

Browser

  • copeestars132 - Copy text from browser to clipboard...natively!

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Apr 9th - Apr 15th, 2018
item.description:
Modules

Array

  • array.chunkstars10 - Split array/TypedArray to chunks of given size.

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Mar 26th - Apr 1st, 2018
item.description:
Modules

Stream

  • syncthroughstars77 - Transform your data as it pass by, synchronously.

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Feb 5th - Feb 11th, 2018
item.description:
Modules

String

  • parse-next-json-valuestars1 - Parse next JSON value from string allowing extraneous characters after value.

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Jan 22nd - Jan 28th, 2018
item.description:
Modules

Date & Time

  • twasstars235 - Generate a relative time string (Example: "3 seconds ago")

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Dec 18th - Dec 24th, 2017
item.description:
Modules

String

  • striptagsstars468 - An implementation of PHP's strip_tags in Node.js.

    • Modules

    Other

  • uuidstars12.7k - Generate RFC-compliant UUIDs in JavaScript.

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Dec 4th - Dec 10th, 2017
item.description:
Modules

Date & Time

  • time-stampstars110 - Get a formatted timestamp.

    Array

  • group-arraystars52 - Group array of objects into lists.

    • Articles

  • Why I think "micro-packages" are a good thing.

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Nov 27th - Dec 3rd, 2017
item.description:
Modules

Date & Time

  • count-days-in-monthstars1 - Get the number of days in a given month.

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Nov 20th - Nov 26th, 2017
item.description:
Modules

Other

  • not-definedstars3 - Checks if foo is not defined, i.e. undefined, null, an empty string, array or object.

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Nov 6th - Nov 12th, 2017
item.description:
Modules

String

  • strip-ansistars336 - Strip ANSI escape codes.

    • Modules

    Function

  • compose-functionstars56 - Compose a new function from smaller functions f(g(x)).

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Oct 23rd - Oct 29th, 2017
item.description:
Modules

Object

  • deep-object-diffstars814 - Deep diff two JavaScript Objects while preserving the data structure. Including nested structures of Arrays and Objects.
  • merge-objectsstars2 - Deep-merge two objects. Arrays that are values of the same object key get concatenated.

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Oct 16th - Oct 22nd, 2017
item.description:
Modules

CLI

  • help-versionstars4 - Easily handle --help and --version arguments in your CLI application

    • Modules

    Stream

  • is-streamstars104 - Check if something is a Node.js stream.

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Oct 9th - Oct 15th, 2017
item.description:
Modules

Function

  • throttle-debouncestars881 - Throttle/debounce your functions.

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Sep 25th - Oct 1st, 2017
item.description:

CLI

  • png-to-icostars126 - Convert png to windows ico format.

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Sep 11th - Sep 17th, 2017
item.description:

Array

  • mirrarraystars5 - Creates a keymirror object from an array of valid keys.

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Dec 12th - Dec 18th, 2016
item.description:
Modules

Date & Time

  • timeago.jsstars4.8k - A tiny(~1.7kb) library used to format date with *** time ago statement.

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Dec 5th - Dec 11th, 2016
item.description:
Articles

  • The cost of small modules

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Jul 25th - Jul 31st, 2016
item.description:

Browser

  • document-readystars57 - Document ready listener for modern browsers.

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Jul 18th - Jul 24th, 2016
item.description:
Modules

Object

  • has-own-propertystars2 - Check if an object has a local property.
  • missing-deep-keysstars0 - Returns an array of keys from first object that are missing in second.

    • Modules

    String

  • rtrimstars0 - Strip whitespace - or other characters - from the end of a string.

    • Modules

    Browser

  • image-promisestars139 - Load one or more <img>s in a Promise.
  • get-media-sizestars12 - Get the original size of any img/video/svg/canvas tags or canvas context.

    • Modules

    CLI

  • minimist - Parse argument options.

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Jun 6th - Jun 12th, 2016
item.description:
Modules

Stream

  • splitstars345 - Break up a stream and reassemble it so that each line is a chunk.

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages May 2nd - May 8th, 2016
item.description:
Modules

Other

  • is-fqdnstars22 - Check if a string represent a fully qualified domain name.

    • Modules

    Stream

  • pumpstars880 - pipe streams together and close all of them if one of them closes.
  • through2-map-promisestars3 - A small promise-based wrapper for through2.

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Apr 25th - May 1st, 2016
item.description:
Modules

String

  • node-slugstars1.1k - slugifies even utf-8 chars.

    • Modules

    Array

  • array-swapstars7 - Swap position of two items in an array.

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Apr 11th - Apr 17th, 2016
item.description:
Modules

Object

  • static-propsstars3 - Defines static object attributes using Object.defineProperties

    • Articles

  • Tiny npm package: Guidelines to create a Node.js module following the small package philosophy

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Mar 28th - Apr 3rd, 2016
item.description:
Modules

Array

  • unordered-array-removestars118 - Efficiently remove an element from an unordered array without doing a splice.

    • Articles

  • In Defense of Hyper Modular JavaScript
  • Small modules: it’s not quite that simple

    • Modules

    Object

  • sorted-objectstars35 - Returns a copy of an object with its keys sorted.

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Mar 21st - Mar 27th, 2016
item.description:
Modules

Array

  • in-arraystars16 - Return true if any of passed values exists in array - faster than using indexOf.

    • Modules

    String

  • pad-leftstars43 - Left pad a string with zeros or a specified string.

    • Modules

    Promise

  • is-promisestars275 - Test whether an object looks like a promises-a+ promise.
  • sleep-promisestars75 - Resolves a promise after a specified delay.

    • Modules

    Generators

  • is-generatorstars15 - Check whether a given value is a generator function.

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Mar 14th - Mar 20th, 2016
item.description:
Modules

Promise

  • pifystars1.5k - Promisify a callback-style function.

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Feb 29th - Mar 6th, 2016
item.description:
Modules

Promise

  • promise-all-propsstars10 - Like Promise.all but for object properties.

    • Modules

    Date & Time

  • akamai-time-referencestars2 - Get reference time using Akamai's time reference service.

    • Modules

    Object

  • has-key-deepstars1 - Deep-search objects for keys. Keys can be searched by providing an array of keys, or using a dot-notiation.

    • Modules

    Math

  • is-numberstars217 - Returns true if the value is a number.

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Feb 22nd - Feb 28th, 2016
item.description:
Modules

CLI

  • usernamestars140 - Get the username of the current user.

    • Modules

    Object

  • stringify-objectstars281 - Stringify an object/array like JSON.stringify just without all the double-quotes.
  • has-valuestars26 - Returns true if a value exists, false if empty. Works with deeply nested values using dot notation ('a.b.c') paths.

    • Modules

    Browser

  • dom-element-valuestars6 - DOM element value getter/setter.

    • Modules

    Date & Time

  • fechastars2k - Javascript Date formatting and parsing.

    • Modules

    File System

  • fs-promisestars171 - Node fs methods as Promise/A+ (optional fs-extra, graceful-fs).
  • dustars30 - A simple JavaScript implementation of du -sb.
  • file-sizestars232 - Lightweight filesize to human-readable / proportions w/o dependencies.
  • tmpstars687 - Temporary file and directory creator for node.js.

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Feb 15th - Feb 21st, 2016
item.description:
Modules

Object

  • is-empty-objectstars11 - Check if an object is empty.

    • Modules

    Date & Time

  • periodsstars1 - Defined time-periods constants for Javascript, in milliseconds.

    • Modules

    Semver

  • semver-first-satisfiedstars2 - Find minimum in an array of version that satisfies a semver range.

    • Modules

    CLI

  • globstars7.7k - Glob functionality for node.js.
  • abbrevstars148 - Calculate the set of unique abbreviations for a given set of strings.

    • Modules

    Module management

  • pkg-confstars115 - Get namespaced config from the closest package.json.
  • normalize-pkgstars18 - Normalize values in package.json to improve compatibility, programmatic readability and usefulness with third party libs.

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Feb 8th - Feb 14th, 2016
item.description:
Articles

  • Evaluating Packages Part 1 - Turn to community
  • Evaluating Packages Part 2 - Review repository

    • Modules

    Function

  • memstars976 - An optimization technique used to speed up consecutive function calls by caching the result of calls with identical input.
  • identity-function - Always return the input argument.

    • Modules

    Array

  • map-arraystars4 - Map object keys and values into an array.

    • Modules

    Object

  • flatten-objstars20 - Converts an object literal with deeply nested nodes to a simple key/value object.

item.title: parro-it/awesome-micro-npm-packages Feb 1st - Feb 7th, 2016
item.description:
Articles

  • One-line node modules
  • Build small single purpose modules
  • Module best practicesstars1.5k

    • Modules

    Array

  • is-sortedstars21 - A small module to check if an Array is sorted.
  • array-firststars11 - Get the first element or first n elements of an array.
  • array-laststars34 - Return the last element in an array.
  • arr-flattenstars60 - Recursively flatten an array or arrays.
  • dedupestars23 - Remove duplicates from an array.
  • array-rangestars25 - Creates a new array with given range.
  • arr-diffstars43 - Returns an array with only the unique values from the first array, by excluding all values from additional arrays using strict equality for comparisons.
  • filled-arraystars40 - Returns an array filled with the specified input

    • Modules

    String

  • decamelizestars218 - Convert a camelized string into a lowercased one with a custom separator: unicornRainbow → unicorn_rainbow.
  • to-camel-casestars37 - Convert a string to a camel case.
  • to-capital-casestars12 - Convert a string to a capital case.
  • to-constant-casestars4 - Convert a string to a constant case.
  • to-dot-casestars4 - Convert a string to a dot case.
  • to-no-casestars15 - Remove an existing case from a string.
  • to-pascal-casestars3 - Convert a string to a pascal case.
  • to-sentence-casestars6 - Convert a string to a sentence case.
  • to-snake-casestars25 - Convert a string to a snake case.
  • to-space-casestars5 - Convert a string to a space case.
  • to-title-casestars18 - Convert a string to a title case.

    • Modules

    Date & Time

  • pretty-msstars874 - Convert milliseconds to a human readable string: 1337000000 → 15d 11h 23m 20s.
  • hirestimestars15 - A wrapper around the built-in high resolution timer which simplifies the calculation of timestamps.

    • Modules

    Object

  • map-objstars143 - Map object keys and values into a new object.
  • filter-objstars81 - Filter object keys and values into a new object.
  • object-valuesstars23 - Get the values of an object.
  • object-pairsstars2 - Turn an object into list of [key, value] pairs for mapping, iterating or other purposes.
  • zipmapstars4 - Returns a map with the keys mapped to the corresponding vals. zipmap also accepts a single value of objects or pairs.
  • just-pluckstars11 - Pluck without the madness.
  • deep-equalstars699 - Node's assert.deepEqual() algorithm as a standalone module.
  • deep-assignstars248 - Recursive Object.assign().
  • set-valuestars252 - Create nested values and any intermediaries dot notation ('a.b.c') paths.
  • get-valuestars217 - Use property paths (a.b.c) to get a nested value from an object.
  • flatkeysstars3 - Flatten object key hierarchies into a list of strings using a custom separator.

    • Modules

    Function

  • currystars314 - A curry function without anything too clever.
  • oncestars209 - Run a function exactly one time.
  • deep-bindstars8 - Bind a context to all functions in an object, including deeply nested functions.

    • Modules

    Stream

  • through2stars1.9k - Tiny wrapper around Node streams2 Transform to avoid explicit subclassing noise.
  • through2-filterstars35 - A through2 to create an Array.prototype.filter analog for streams.
  • through2-mapstars70 - A through2 to create an Array.prototype.map analog for streams.
  • stream-spigotstars15 - A readable stream generator, useful for testing or converting simple functions into Readable streams.
  • concat-streamstars565 - writable stream that concatenates strings or data and calls a callback with the result.
  • JSONStreamstars1.9k - streaming JSON.parse and stringify

    • Modules

    File System

  • rimrafstars4.9k - A deep deletion module for node (like rm -rf).
  • mkdirp - Recursively mkdir, like mkdir -p.

    • Modules

    Browser

  • delegatestars179 - Lightweight event delegation.
  • insert-css - Insert a string of css into the head

    • Modules

    Semver

  • semverstars4.4k - The semantic version parser used by npm.
  • semver-maxstars3 - Find maximum (or minimum) version according to semver.

    • Modules

    Other

  • node-mimestars1.9k - Comprehensive MIME type mapping API based on mime-db module.

    • Related lists

  • awesome-nodejsstars47.3k - A curated list of delightful Node.js packages and resources.
  • awesome-npmstars4.1k - Awesome npm resources and tips.
